data.title: Stellantis expands fleet, wholesale, and digital operations
data.description: The effort also emphasizes digital integration, allowing orders, inventory, and billing to be managed online.

data.title: Walgreens now operating as private company under new CEO
data.description: Upon completing its transition to go private through an acquisition by Sycamore Partners and billionaire Billionaire Stefano Pessina, Walgreens is now operating under a new CEO.

data.title: Syndigo acquires 1WorldSync to expand AI-driven product experience
data.description: For B2B ecommerce, the deal highlights the growing reliance on AI-driven product content to reduce friction and drive sales.

data.title: Southern Glazer’s names an executive to lead digital strategy
data.description: Steve Bronson will oversee Southern Glazer’s technology strategy, working closely with teams focused on digital acceleration

data.title: Best Buy and others add Uber Eats, Instacart for delivery options
data.description: Best Buy joins a growing trend of retailers using Uber Eats, Instacart and DoorDash to provide same-day delivery.
